title: Tune champion timeline curve smoothing
description: Adjust ScoreChampionVersionTimeline line interpolation to reduce excessive Bezier-like curvature while keeping lines smoother than sharp angular turns.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted champion timeline line interpolation from Recharts monotone to a tuned cardinal curve (tension 0.55) across combined and per-score series. This keeps rounded motion but sharpens the turns compared with the previous Bezier-like curve. Focused ScoreChampionVersionTimeline Jest test and dashboard typecheck pass.
